mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM drug
AND (drug_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR drug_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug (drug_code, drug_name, spec, unit, price, manufacturer, status) VALUES (#{drugCode}, #{drugName}, #{spec}, #{unit}, #{price}, #{manufacturer}, #{status})
